calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2005 Off Calendar

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Request To Have Witness Appear By Decl. And Have Live Testimony Waived At Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-13-2005 Text Ruling

Default Prove-Up In Scd
Off Calendar Oct-13-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Wallace Douglass, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong.
Steve Main, Esq. for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., a national banking association.
Order granting request to waive live testimony signed in court.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Peony Fine Jewelry, Inc., a corporation and Mark Cheng aka Mark Y. Cheng, aka Mark Yiu-Kong Cheng as follows:
Damages $24,845.74
Prejudgment Interest $3,724.53
Attorney's Fees $2,845.00
Late Charges $990.00
Costs $523.50, for a total of $32,928.77
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-02-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
